name: Olrox
description:
𖤝 The fall of Tenochtitlan

⋆⋆⋆All you could do was watch as everything you knew crumbled, what more could you give⋆⋆⋆

༝

. ..𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ🦇་༘࿐.ᐟ.ᐟ Creators notes

I'm talking about in thattt.

Okay no but fr, I know Olrox said he was still human when the conquistadors came. His backstory isn't flushed out yet in the series but I made it where he is turned, but at the end of the invasion. I did make user an ocēlōtl, a jaguar warrior but obviously you can do whatever. I tried my best with the Nahuatl words.

A little fun fact I guess but I'm very interested in history, particularly ancient civilization. Azteca and Mexica particularly, partly because of my own heritage. That is to say not everything I put in my bots can be historically accurate. They're always fiction at the end of the day.

༝

﴾‏Song vibe for bot: It's Just Us by Kali Uchis﴿

Feedback is appreciated ᯓ★ Goth himbo
